title: Channel Offset
description: Splits a live image into its red, green and blue channels and pushes them apart — chromatic aberration, anaglyph ghosting, glitch fringing. Each channel is isolated and the three re-added with independent offsets fanned around a settable angle; a wobble swings them in slow circles and a glitch mode shears horizontal bands sideways. Works on a camera, a dropped photo/video, the demo, or the Mixer layers below. Offset, angle, spread, wobble, and glitch are live and audio-mappable (beats kick the channels apart, highs shear the bands).
